# Behavior Manifold

Prototype positions extracted from `magic/behavior_manifold.py`.

## 12 Dimensions

| # | Key | Name | Description | Normalization |
|---|-----|------|-------------|---------------|
| 0 | `thermal_flux` | Thermal flux | Rate of temperature equilibration | / 2.0, clipped |
| 1 | `avg_temperature` | Avg temperature | Mean element temperature (K) | log10 / log10(30000) |
| 2 | `temp_differential` | Temp differential | Temperature range (K) | log10 / log10(30000) |
| 3 | `state_transition_energy` | State transition energy | Energy for phase change | log10 / log10(20000) |
| 4 | `phase_diversity` | Phase diversity | Fraction of distinct states | linear 0–1 |
| 5 | `density_gradient` | Density gradient | Density std dev | linear 0–1 |
| 6 | `avg_density` | Avg density | Mean density | linear 0–1 |
| 7 | `volatility_index` | Volatility index | Mean volatility | linear 0–1 |
| 8 | `chaos_factor` | Chaos factor | Cross-property variance | linear 0–1 |
| 9 | `total_energy` | Total energy | Sum of element energies | / 600, clipped |
| 10 | `energy_density` | Energy density | Energy per element | / 150, clipped |
| 11 | `polarity_tension` | Polarity tension | Polarity imbalance | −1 to +1 |
